raw.message:
BIG NEWS!
Get ready for the most epic gaming experience of your life!
What secrets will you uncover?
Play now and find out!

hook.summary: A POV shot of a mobile game where a 'boyfriend' uses a high-level unit to carry the player.
hook.visual_action: Handheld camera recording a phone screen showing split-screen gameplay with text overlays.
hook.text_overlay: POV: The Reason I'm Dating this Guy He's Got Max Level Surprise Mouse lol

scene_flow: POV shot of a phone screen showing a tower defense game with 'Boyfriend' and 'Me' labels.
The 'Boyfriend' side uses a 'Max Level Surprise Mouse' to easily defeat waves of enemies.
The 'Me' side is shown doing nothing, emphasizing the 'getting carried' narrative.
The gameplay continues to demonstrate the power of the specific unit and the ease of victory.
on_screen_text: POV: The Reason I'm Dating this Guy He's Got Max Level Surprise Mouse lol
Getting carried without lifting a finger
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who relate to relationship-based gaming memes and power-progression mechanics.
